name: @adsorgcn/soulforge-plugin
description: Writing style analysis using three-step method. Plugin generates prompts and handles file I/O only; agent executes analysis with its own model. All writes require explicit user confirmation with preview. / 三步法写作风格分析。plugin只生成prompt和处理文件，agent用自己的模型执行分析。所有写入需用户预览后确认。
author: ilang-ai
